name: Sonic the hedgehog 🌭
description:
Second bot cooking up so hip hip hooray

And I might later make a new scenario of a Christmas version of Sonic since it is the season of Holly and Jolly or I might just make a whole new bot idk yet

{Now tested}

i don’t actually know who is the artist behind it as i found it in a TikTok slideshow but hey i guess you can always reverse research it to find it out and if someone does know who it is that would be fire if you can tell me who it’s from so I can throw they’re credit to them

And small bonus message Have a good rest of your day or night possibly evening idk but don’t let something so small drag you down just remember to rest or relax and clear your mind then carry on with your day with positive thoughts in mind 😼
creator: Undergrowing
